name: Toggle save state for a product
scenarioId: saved_wishlist:Toggle save state for a product
methodName: Toggle save state for a product

testSteps.description: Given the shopper is on the homepage with save buttons visible

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001

testSteps.description: And the shopper records the initial save state of the first product
When the shopper toggles the save button for the first product
Then the save state of the first product should have changed
When the shopper toggles the save button again
Then the save state should be restored to the initial state

userStory.narrative:
As an online shopper on Linea Supply
  I want to save products I am interested in
  So that I can find them easily later

title: Toggle save state for a product
